summary: Plan-only remediation shard classified three open PRs independently and routed #92025 and #93340 to central security handling after deterministic validation identified them as security-sensitive targets. No merge action is recommended because the artifact lacks required Codex /review proof and mergeability is unknown for every PR. No executable fix artifact is retained because the only planned repair path depended on the quarantined security-sensitive PRs.
